title: The Sit-In: Harry Belafonte Hosts the Tonight Show
original_title: The Sit-In: Harry Belafonte Hosts The Tonight Show
overview: For one week in February 1968, Johnny Carson gave up his chair to Harry Belafonte, the first time an African-American had hosted a late night TV show for a whole week.
